name: Goblin
description: Small, green-skinned humanoids known for their cunning and cruelty. Goblins travel in packs, ambushing travelers and using sheer numbers to overwhelm their foes. They rely on speed and trickery rather than strength.
examples: a sneaky goblin hiding behind rocks
a group of goblins attacking the caravan
a goblin thief trying to steal your gold

name: Orc
description: Brutal warriors driven by rage and tribal pride. Orcs fight with savage strength, wielding crude axes or clubs. Their war cries echo across the battlefield as they charge without fear.
examples: an orc swinging a massive axe
orc raiders charging from the hills
a lone orc challenging you to a duel

name: Skeleton
description: Undead warriors animated by dark necromancy. Their bones rattle as they march forward with eerie silence, armed with rusted weapons but endless endurance. They feel no pain or fear.
examples: a skeleton soldier raising its sword
a skeleton archer aiming from the shadows

name: Troll
description: Towering, regenerating monsters that heal rapidly from most wounds. Trolls are slow-witted but relentless, smashing enemies with sheer brute force. Fire and acid are their only true weaknesses.
examples: a giant troll smashing the bridge
a wounded troll regenerating before your eyes
troll roaring as it swings its club

name: Dragon
description: Ancient, majestic, and terrifying. Dragons are apex predators with immense strength and intellect. They command elemental breath — fire, ice, lightning, or poison — and hoard treasures beyond imagination.
examples: a red dragon breathing fire over the village
a dragon guarding its golden hoard
a wounded dragon thrashing in fury
